circuitBreaker((uint32,uint32,int192),ui.details: bound on notional cap from circuit breakerThree cases:1. minted < 1x target amount over circuitBreakerWindow: return cap2. minted > 2x target amount over last circuitBreakerWindow: return 03. minted between 1x and 2x target amount: return cap * (2 - minted/target)
